reviews.comment:
No es culpa de los empleados pero por lo general solo hay dos islas abiertas y demoras demasiado en cargar

(Translated by Google)
It's not the employees' fault but there are usually only two islands open and it takes too long to load.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9098900885435931533/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURxX0xQeVVnEAE

reviews.comment:
Cuentan con una confitería, muy completa.Las empleadas, súper cálidas.Ya nos asombramos cuando la atención es óptima.Tbn está la parte donde uno puede sacar la licencia para conducir.

(Translated by Google)
They have a very well-stocked confectionery shop. The staff are incredibly friendly. We were already amazed by the excellent service. They also have a section where you can get a driver's license.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9098900885435931533/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR4dE5MVmt3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Muy bien atendido, como siempre. Soy socio hace 55 años y vitalicio. es lo mejor

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service, as always. I've been a member for 55 years and have a lifetime membership. It's the best.
